overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character crossing a rope bridge over a canyon, exploring a cliffside overlook with views of a waterfall and river, then walking along a dirt path into a dense bamboo forest. The scene features vibrant autumn colors with golden trees contrasting against green bamboo under clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rope bridge crossing over canyon river

agents.ego_description: samurai character walks steadily across the wooden rope bridge toward the distant bamboo forest

entered.detail: wooden rope bridge with plank flooring and rope railings spanning the canyon
tall rocky canyon walls on both sides of the bridge
turquoise river flowing through the canyon below the bridge
dense bamboo grove visible on the far side of the canyon
simple wooden torii-style structure marking the bridge exit

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks across a wooden rope bridge suspended over a deep canyon with turquoise water below. The bridge is flanked by rocky cliffs and leads toward a bamboo forest visible in the distance under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlook with canyon views

events.description: exits the rope bridge onto solid ground at the cliff edge
character turns left to walk along the cliff edge overlooking the canyon
UI text 'HIYOSHI PREFECTURE' appears briefly on screen

agents.ego_description: samurai exits the bridge and walks along the cliff edge, stopping to overlook the canyon and waterfall below

entered.detail: narrow grassy path along the cliff edge with rocky outcrops
waterfall cascading down the canyon wall into the river below
golden yellow ginkgo trees growing along the canyon rim

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the samurai explores the cliff edge, turning left to walk along the rim. The view opens to reveal a waterfall cascading into the canyon below, surrounded by golden autumn trees. The character stops at an overlook to observe the scenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path through tall grass into bamboo forest

events.description: leaves the cliff overlook and enters the dirt trail through grassland
enters dense bamboo forest section with tall grass on both sides

agents.ego_description: samurai walks along the dirt path leaving the canyon behind, entering the dense bamboo forest

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through tall grass
tall green grass lining both sides of the path
wooden guard tower visible in the distance among the trees

segments.scene_description: The samurai leaves the canyon overlook and follows a dirt trail through tall grass, entering a dense bamboo forest. The path winds deeper into the forest as the bamboo groves close in on both sides, with a wooden watchtower visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a precarious canyon crossing into a serene, enclosed bamboo forest. It begins with the samurai walking across a wooden rope bridge suspended over turquoise water and deep rocky cliffs under a clear blue sky. As the bridge is crossed, the camera follows the character along the cliff rim, where the view opens to reveal a cascading waterfall framed by vibrant golden autumn trees. The scene then shifts as the samurai leaves the overlook to follow a dirt trail through tall grass, moving away from the open canyon. Finally, the path winds deeper into a dense bamboo forest where the groves close in on both sides, leading toward a distant wooden watchtower.
